title: U.S. and Iran Reignite War Over Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The two countries slid back to open war over the waterway, as the U.S. planned to reinstate a blockade on Iranian ports on Tuesday. Iran said it had attacked two tankers and fired at U.S. military sites.
summary_public: The two countries slid back to open war over the waterway, as the U.S. planned to reinstate a blockade on Iranian ports on Tuesday. Iran said it had attacked two tankers and fired at U.S. military sites.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran attacked two tankers and fired at U.S. sites.
